summary.acceptance_ratio_threshold_note: 0.5-2.0 is a sanity guard for external-to-candidate flow scale, not a calibrated pressure-flow agreement threshold
summary.allowed_use: pressure-flow external result binding;formal qch sidecar acceptance preflight

external_result_template_rows.required_validation_source: exact W500/D900 sidewall COMSOL pressure-flow run or matched measurement
